ground_truth.title: Squarespace Roadmap Discussion
ground_truth.author: ron1cne
ground_truth.main_content:
ron1cne
August 26, 2024

Hi, I'd like to know the Squarespace roadmap for future products and version releases. It appears the only forum information posted are changes to the released products. Thank you!

paul2009
August 27, 2024

On 8/26/2024 at 5:29 PM, ron1cne said:

I'd like to know the Squarespace roadmap for future products

For more insight into Squarespace products and the roadmap, you may want to check if you are eligible to join the Squarespace Circle.
with: I'd like to know the Squarespace roadmap for future products and version releases.
It appears the only forum information posted are changes to the released products.
For more insight into Squarespace products and the roadmap, you may want to check if you are eligible to join the Squarespace Circle.
without: Create an account or sign in to comment
